channel.title: FR Game_video on Dsconti per te!
channel.description: Recent content in FR Game_video on Dsconti per te!

item.title: Nintendo - Monster Hunter Rise Video Game Card
item.description: Puoi trovare Nintendo - Monster Hunter Rise Video Game Card qui: ℹ️: MONSTER HUNTER RISE, the newest entry in the critically acclaimed action-RPG series, is coming to the Nintendo Switch! Battle fearsome monsters and use your rewards to craft a huge variety of epic weapons and armour. Set in the scenic land of Kamura Village, inspired by ancient Japan, MONSTER HUNTER RISE invites you to explore lush ecosystems and battle fearsome monsters to become the ultimate hunter.
